recapPrompt.prompt: In a stack, where do push and pop happen?

choices.label: At the top
choices.feedback: Correct. Both actions happen at the top of the stack.

choices.label: In the middle
choices.feedback: Not this one. Stacks do not usually remove from the middle.

reflectionPrompt.prompt: Explain in your own words when a stack is a smart choice.

practiceChallenge.title: Mastery check: rebuild the stack clues
practiceChallenge.description: Complete the helper so it returns the main stack clue for each kind of problem.
hints: Symbols use the most recent unfinished opening symbol.
History problems often need the latest action or score.
A stack is a clue when the top or newest item matters most.
practiceChallenge.successMessage: Pass. You rebuilt the main stack clues from memory.
practiceChallenge.retryMessage: Needs practice. Recheck how symbols, history, and recent-first order connect to stacks.

blanks.label: Main clue for score or undo history
